reference: Hi, my mother had a chest X-ray results today which have shown an opaque spot on the soft tissue around her lung. Her X-ray was due to continuous coughing. She is asthmatic and has had pleurisy. The doctor wants to see her in a week and has requested a computed tomography scan done. There seemed to be no urgency in terms of when they saw her. My automatic fear is cancer - is this automatically the case?
text: Hi, my mother had a chest x-ray results today, which have shown an opaque spot on the soft tissue around her lungs. Her x-ray was due to continuous coughing. She is asthmatic and has had fluorescein. The doctor wants to see her every week and has requested a computed tomognition. There seemed to be no urgency in terms of when they saw her. My automatic fear is cancer? Is this automatically the case?
